summary: Yt Iterate Two Days component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「来回调整与测试」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-iterate-two-days/src/YtIterateTwoDays.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtIterateTwoDays` and `ytIterateTwoDaysDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Iterate Two Days Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-iterate-two-days to my project. Preserve the exported YtIterateTwoDaysProps API and register the YtIterateTwoDays composition with the default props.
